description_long: This object is a heavy, tripod-mounted rifle with a robust, industrial design, likely intended for sustained fire in defensive or support roles. The main body is constructed from dark metallic materials, featuring a long barrel and a prominent ammunition belt feeding into the chamber from a large, boxy magazine on the side. The rifle is supported by a sturdy bipod or tripod, providing stability for accurate firing. The ammunition belt is visible, with several brass-colored rounds ready for use, and the receiver area is angular and reinforced. The rear section lacks a traditional stock, instead featuring a mechanical or utilitarian structure, possibly for mounting or transport. The overall appearance suggests a weapon designed for urban defense or suppression, with a focus on durability and firepower.
description: A heavy, tripod-mounted rifle with a visible ammunition belt and large side-mounted magazine, built from dark metal and designed for sustained fire. Its industrial, robust design emphasizes stability and firepower.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the ammunition belt, and the large box magazine attached to the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, bipod legs, and the alignment of the ammunition belt feeding into the chamber.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine and the rear mechanical structure, with the ammunition belt visible on the far side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the magazine and the mechanical rear section, with the bipod legs extending forward.
